currentFocus:
Wrapping up the mBERT cross-lingual sentiment paper. Running final ablations on the Hinglish dataset to see where the circuits diverge from standard Hindi. Also polishing Circuit Surgeon so it ships alongside the paper as a reproducibility artifact.

Outside of direct research, reviewing Anthropic's latest work on SAEs and feature splitting. Their monosemanticity paper keeps giving me new angles on how to think about feature geometry.
currentlyListening: Lo-fi beats and Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan on loop. The qawwali keeps me locked in during long patching sessions.
currentlyAnnoyed: Why does every ML paper bury the actual methodology in the appendix? If your method is sound, put it front and center.
readingList: A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits
lifeUpdate: Third year is moving fast. Trying to balance the paper deadline with coursework and not lose my mind. Coffee intake has crossed the 'concerning' threshold. The weather in Greater Noida is finally not trying to kill me.
